studio.label: Studio
studio.purpose: Data governance, catalog management, stewardship, lineage, glossary admin, metadata enrichment

explorer.label: Explorer
explorer.purpose: Data marketplace, discovery, consumption, business glossary browsing, data product access

administration.label: Administration
administration.purpose: User management, connections, catalog configuration, system settings

catalog-object.label: Catalog Object
catalog-object.description: Any indexed item. Types: Dataset, Field, Visualization, Data Process, Data Product, Glossary Item, Custom Item, Category

domain.label: Domain
domain.description: Organizational/business unit owning a set of data assets

data-product.label: Data Product
data-product.description: Curated, business-ready asset. Contains Input Ports and Output Ports. Published to marketplace.

data-contract.label: Data Contract
data-contract.description: Formal agreement on an Output Port defining quality thresholds, access permissions, validation rules

glossary-term.label: Glossary Term
glossary-term.description: Business vocabulary entry linked to technical assets

custom-asset.label: Custom Asset
custom-asset.description: User-defined asset type extending the catalog model

lineage.label: Lineage
lineage.description: Field-level transformation tracking from source to downstream

governance-policy.label: Governance Policy
governance-policy.description: Access rules, quality rules, compliance constraints

scanner.label: Scanner
scanner.description: External data ingestion agent that discovers and imports metadata from connections

connection.label: Connection
connection.description: Configuration for a data source connector (93+ pre-built)

user-group.label: User / Group
user-group.description: Identity and role assignments. Groups: Explorer, Data Steward, Super Admin

observability-signal.label: Observability Signal
observability-signal.description: Quality score, freshness, usage stats attached to assets

access-request.label: Access Request
access-request.description: Consumer request for data product/item access with policy-driven approval workflow

watchlist.label: Watchlist
watchlist.description: Saved filter shortcut on Studio Dashboard

discussion-thread.label: Discussion Thread
discussion-thread.description: Conversation thread on Dataset detail pages

topic.meaning: Curated, filtered collection of catalog items for Explorer

completion-level.meaning: Percentage of metadata filled for an item

curator.meaning: Person responsible for curating a catalog item

output-port.meaning: Published endpoint/view of a data product

view-360.meaning: Radial knowledge graph centered on an asset

watchlist.meaning: Saved filter shortcut on Studio Dashboard

perimeter.meaning: Scope of a curator's item responsibility

pii.meaning: Personally Identifiable Information flag on fields

ask-ai.meaning: Natural language query feature in Explorer

ai-ready.meaning: Auto-tag on Topics with well-documented items

data-sampling.meaning: Sample data rows from a dataset

input-port.meaning: Interface for receiving upstream data into a data product

discussion-thread.meaning: Conversation on a Dataset detail page

access-request-policy.meaning: Rules governing the approval workflow for data access

interactive-graph.label: Interactive graph visualization
interactive-graph.description: Used for lineage (DAG), View 360 (radial knowledge graph), and Data Model (ER diagram). Nodes are clickable.

template-builder.label: Drag-and-drop template builder
template-builder.description: Studio feature for creating documentation templates via Catalog Design page.

marketplace-browsing.label: Marketplace browsing
marketplace-browsing.description: Explorer homepage: search-first with curated sections (carousels, filter chips, topic cards).

asset-detail-360.label: 360-degree asset detail view
asset-detail-360.description: Every catalog object has a tabbed detail page with property panel/sidebar.

right-sliding-drawer.label: Right sliding drawer
right-sliding-drawer.description: Opens from list row click. Studio: quick edit. Explorer: quick view with Request Access.

smart-suggestions.label: Smart suggestions
smart-suggestions.description: AI-powered metadata enrichment: suggestion counts inline, dedicated Suggestions tab.

import-wizard.label: Multi-step import wizard
import-wizard.description: 6-step horizontal stepper (Connection → Items → Curator → Contact → Data Product → Confirm).

type-picker-grid.label: Type picker grid
type-picker-grid.description: Grid of type tiles with color-coded icons for New Item creation.

analytics-dashboard.label: Analytics dashboard
analytics-dashboard.description: Completion cards, adoption rate charts, popular items, frequent searches.

activity-timeline.label: Activity timeline
activity-timeline.description: Chronological timeline with date headers, user avatars, action descriptions.

access-request-management.label: Access request management
access-request-management.description: Table with Requester, Item, Status, Actions. Status tabs: Pending / Done.

notification-system.label: Notification system
notification-system.description: Bell icon with unread counter. Three notification types with click-to-action redirects.

discussion-threads.label: Discussion threads
discussion-threads.description: Available on Dataset detail pages. Users create threads, reply, edit own messages.

ask-ai.label: Ask AI
ask-ai.description: Natural language query search through the knowledge graph with AI-generated summaries.

suggestion-workflow.label: Suggestion workflow
suggestion-workflow.description: Explorer users submit suggestions, curators review (accept/decline with comment).

access-request-workflow.label: Access request workflow
access-request-workflow.description: Request Access button, form with Use Case dropdown, 6 statuses, policy-driven approval.

data-profiling-sampling.label: Data profiling and sampling
data-profiling-sampling.description: Statistical graphs on fields (profiling) and sample data preview rows (sampling).

federated-catalog.label: Federated Catalog
federated-catalog.description: Multi-catalog federation with scoped permissions and cross-catalog search.

federated-knowledge-graph.label: Federated knowledge graph
federated-knowledge-graph.description: Underlying architecture connecting all metadata with domain-specific ontologies.

mcp-server.label: Actian MCP Server
mcp-server.description: 7 tools for AI integrations (Find Glossary, Semantic Search, Get Data Model, etc.).

filter-groups-form.label: Filter-groups edit form with sticky footer
filter-groups-form.description: Edit-group / permission / role configuration pattern. Page header + top inputs section + one or more collapsible filter-group sections, each containing label rows with toggle switches, plus optional slot cards for nested config (Checkbox + Toggle stacks). Sticky footer pinned at the bottom for save/cancel actions. Used when administrators configure access bundles or named groups with many fine-grained permissions.

search-filtered-table.label: Search-filtered list table
search-filtered-table.description: List table with an inline Search input directly above it (no separate filter sidebar). Common for member directories, group lists, scanner inventories, connection lists. Pairs Page header → Search → Table. Search filters table contents in place; no other facets.

table-with-tabs.label: Tab-filtered dashboard table
table-with-tabs.description: Page header → Tabs → Table layout. Tabs split the table by status (Active / Pending / Archived), type (My / Shared / All), or role-scoped view. Used for admin dashboards, queue views, and any list where users mentally pre-filter by category before scanning rows.
